allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('esboço_final_infografia.html', 'utf8'\); console.log\('File size:', html.length, 'chars'\); const scripts = \(html.match\(/<script/g\)||[]\).length; const scriptClose = \(html.match\(/<\\/script>/g\)||[]\).length; console.log\('Script tags open/close:', scripts, '/', scriptClose\); const divOpen = \(html.match\(/<div/g\)||[]\).length; const divClose = \(html.match\(/<\\/div>/g\)||[]\).length; console.log\('Div open/close:', divOpen, '/', divClose\);")
